meaning: n.机器人,遥控设备,自动机械,机械般工作的人
examples: This is the latest in robot technology.
The company is credited with inventing the industrial robot.
The robot was programmed to mimic a series of human movements.
In the game, the Indian-born billionaire is featured as a robot that has to be defeated.
Likewise, a web crawling robot which follows links such as Google is not effective.
